title: baziasa urticifolia
intro: Baziasa urticifolia, also known as the stinging nettle tree, is a plant species that belongs to the family Sapindaceae. It is a deciduous tree native to tropical Africa, known for its medicinal properties and health benefits. The plant contains compounds with anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions, including arthritis, asthma, and skin conditions. Baziasa urticifolia can be prepared as herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and is often used in traditional African medicine.
